name: Chicken Machboos
description: Traditional Qatari spiced rice with chicken, slow-cooked with aromatic baharat and dried lime
ingredients: chicken, basmati rice, onions, tomatoes, baharat spice, loomi, saffron

name: Harees
description: Hearty wheat and chicken porridge, slow-cooked until silky smooth
ingredients: wheat, chicken, butter, salt, cinnamon, cardamom

name: Luqaimat
description: Crispy golden dumplings drizzled with date syrup and sesame seeds
ingredients: flour, yeast, sugar, saffron, cardamom, date syrup, sesame seeds, oil

name: Balaleet
description: Sweet vermicelli noodles topped with a savory egg omelette, a classic Qatari breakfast
ingredients: vermicelli noodles, eggs, sugar, butter, cardamom, saffron, rose water

name: Thareed
description: Layered bread and vegetable stew with tender lamb, soaked in a rich tomato broth
ingredients: lamb, flatbread, tomatoes, potatoes, zucchini, onions, garlic, baharat spice

name: Pasta Carbonara
description: Classic Roman pasta with eggs, pecorino cheese, guanciale, and black pepper
ingredients: spaghetti, eggs, pecorino romano, guanciale, black pepper, salt

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Marinated chicken pieces in a rich, spiced tomato and cream sauce
ingredients: chicken, yogurt, tomatoes, cream, ginger, garlic, garam masala, turmeric, cumin, chili powder

name: Beef Tacos
description: Seasoned ground beef in warm corn tortillas with fresh toppings
ingredients: ground beef, corn tortillas, lettuce, tomatoes, cheese, sour cream, cumin, chili powder

name: Sushi Rolls
description: Hand-rolled maki sushi with fresh fish, avocado, and seasoned rice
ingredients: sushi rice, nori seaweed, salmon, avocado, cucumber, rice vinegar, soy sauce, wasabi

name: Kunafa
description: Crunchy shredded pastry filled with sweet cheese, soaked in sugar syrup
ingredients: kataifi pastry, mozzarella, ricotta, butter, sugar syrup, rose water, pistachios
